name: Dulus
description: Use IA as an agent without an API key. $0. Harvest your browser session for Gemini (guest, no login), Claude.ai, Claude Code, Kimi.com, Qwen, DeepSeek — drive them like an API, no per-token billing. Plus LiteLLM (100+ paid providers), local models via Ollama, /lang in 34 languages, Mesa Redonda, voice, OCR, MemPalace, embedded sandbox OS.
summaryZh: Use IA as an agent without an API key. $0. Harvest your browser session for Gemini (guest, no login), Claude.ai, Claude Code, Kimi.com, Qwen, DeepSeek — drive them like an API, no per-token billing. Plus LiteLLM (100+ paid providers), local models via Ollama, /lang in 34 languages, Mesa Redonda, voice, OCR, MemPalace, embedded sandbox OS. 这类项目更偏执行与编排，适合搭自动化工作流或多代理系统。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合想做自动化助手、多 Agent 编排和企业工作流的团队。
